articles.title: Apple plays catch-up at WWDC
articles.summary: Apple spent much of its WWDC keynote highlighting fixes, performance improvements, and long-requested features before unveiling its upgraded AI-powered Siri, signaling that the company wants users to see AI as just one part of a broader effort to improve its software.

articles.summary: The botnet was reportedly tied to a Russia-based residential proxy network.
